examples.sentence: When I questioned his decision, he immediately had his back up and wouldn't listen to reason.
examples.translation: Cuando cuestioné su decisión, inmediatamente se puso a la defensiva y no quiso escuchar razones.

examples.sentence: You could tell Sarah had her back up during the meeting because she kept interrupting everyone.
examples.translation: Se podía notar que Sarah estaba molesta durante la reunión porque no paraba de interrumpir a todos.

examples.sentence: If he has his back up, it's best not to push him any further on that topic.
examples.translation: Si está a la defensiva, es mejor no presionarlo más sobre ese tema.

examples.sentence: Grandma always makes sure I have my bread buttered for life by preparing sandwiches every afternoon.
examples.translation: La abuela siempre se asegura de que tenga mi pan untado con mantequilla de por vida preparando sándwiches todas las tardes.

examples.sentence: Throughout the week, he has his bread buttered for life by the chef at the café where he works.
examples.translation: Durante la semana, tiene su pan untado con mantequilla de por vida gracias al chef del café donde trabaja.

examples.sentence: They will have their bread buttered for life as the bakery supplies them with fresh buttered bread daily.
examples.translation: Tendrán su pan untado con mantequilla de por vida ya que la panadería les suministra pan fresco con mantequilla a diario.

examples.sentence: If you visit the countryside, you might see villagers who literally have their bread buttered for life by local farms.
examples.translation: Si visitas el campo, tal vez veas a aldeanos que literalmente tienen su pan untado con mantequilla de por vida gracias a las granjas locales.

examples.sentence: With that trust fund, Emily has her bread buttered for life and never worries about money.
examples.translation: Con ese fondo fiduciario, Emily está asegurada financieramente de por vida y nunca se preocupa por el dinero.

examples.sentence: If you marry into that family, you'll have your bread buttered for life with all their wealth.
examples.translation: Si te casas con esa familia, estarás asegurado para toda la vida con toda su riqueza.

examples.sentence: He worked hard to ensure his children would have their bread buttered for life through investments.
examples.translation: Trabajó duro para asegurarse de que sus hijos estuvieran asegurados para toda la vida mediante inversiones.

examples.sentence: As soon as I cut the cake, I couldn't have my cake and eat it too since the slices were gone.
examples.translation: Tan pronto como corté el pastel, no pude tener el pastel y comerlo también porque las rebanadas desaparecieron.

examples.sentence: She was told she couldn't have her cake and eat it too when she tried to keep the antique and sell it at the same time.
examples.translation: Le dijeron que no podía querer tener el pastel y comérselo también cuando intentó conservar la antigüedad y venderla al mismo tiempo.

examples.sentence: If you spend all your savings on the trip, you won't be able to have your cake and eat it too later on.
examples.translation: Si gastas todos tus ahorros en el viaje, no podrás tener el pastel y comértelo también más adelante.

examples.sentence: We arranged the cake on the table, but you can’t have your cake and eat it too; once it’s eaten, it’s gone.
examples.translation: Colocamos el pastel en la mesa, pero no puedes tener el pastel y comértelo también; una vez que se come, se acaba.

examples.sentence: You can't have your cake and eat it too by wanting to work fewer hours but earn more money.
examples.translation: No puedes querer tenerlo todo y que te salga bien al querer trabajar menos horas pero ganar más dinero.

examples.sentence: They tried to have their cake and eat it too by demanding full control while sharing profits equally.
examples.translation: Intentaron tenerlo todo al exigir control total y al mismo tiempo compartir las ganancias por igual.

examples.sentence: If you want to own the company and still avoid risks, you can't have your cake and eat it too.
examples.translation: Si quieres ser dueño de la empresa y evitar riesgos, no puedes quererlo todo y que te salga bien.

examples.sentence: The farmer spent the morning making sure he had his ducks in a row along the fence.
examples.translation: El granjero pasó la mañana asegurándose de tener a sus patos en fila a lo largo de la cerca.

examples.sentence: We arranged the rubber ducks in the bathtub carefully so they had their ducks in a row before the kids arrived.
examples.translation: Colocamos los patitos de goma en la bañera cuidadosamente para que estuvieran en fila antes de que llegaran los niños.

examples.sentence: They had their ducks in a row on the pond, lined up perfectly for the photo shoot.
examples.translation: Tenían a los patos en fila en el estanque, alineados perfectamente para la sesión de fotos.

examples.sentence: If you want to attract the ducks, you should first have your ducks in a row near the water’s edge.
examples.translation: Si quieres atraer a los patos, primero debes tenerlos en fila cerca de la orilla del agua.

examples.sentence: Before the big presentation, Jenna really had her ducks in a row, with every detail planned out.
examples.translation: Antes de la gran presentación, Jenna tenía todo bien organizado, con cada detalle planeado.

examples.sentence: You need to have your ducks in a row if you want the project to go smoothly.
examples.translation: Necesitas tener todo en orden si quieres que el proyecto salga bien.

examples.sentence: They will have their ducks in a row by tomorrow, so the meeting should proceed without issues.
examples.translation: Tendrán todo organizado para mañana, así que la reunión debería desarrollarse sin problemas.

examples.sentence: The sculptor carefully had his subject's ears lowered to create a more unique look.
examples.translation: El escultor bajó cuidadosamente las orejas de su sujeto para crear un aspecto más único.

examples.sentence: We had the rabbit’s ears lowered slightly to fit the character design better.
examples.translation: Bajamos un poco las orejas del conejo para que encajara mejor en el diseño del personaje.

examples.sentence: She had her ears lowered in the portrait, adding a subtle expression of shyness.
examples.translation: Ella tenía las orejas bajadas en el retrato, lo que añadía una expresión sutil de timidez.

examples.sentence: When the ears are lowered, the animal often appears calmer or more submissive.
examples.translation: Cuando las orejas están bajas, el animal a menudo parece más tranquilo o sumiso.

examples.sentence: After the long hike, I finally had my ears lowered at the barber’s to freshen up my look.
examples.translation: Después de la larga caminata, finalmente me corté las orejas en la peluquería para renovar mi aspecto.

examples.sentence: If you want a neat appearance, you should have your ears lowered regularly at the salon.
examples.translation: Si quieres un aspecto ordenado, deberías cortarte las orejas regularmente en el salón.

examples.sentence: She was nervous about having her ears lowered, but the stylist did a great job trimming around them.
examples.translation: Estaba nerviosa por cortarse las orejas, pero la estilista hizo un gran trabajo recortando alrededor.

examples.sentence: The dog had its ears pinned back tightly after the vet’s checkup.
examples.translation: El perro tenía las orejas pegadas hacia atrás después del chequeo del veterinario.

examples.sentence: During the costume party, she had her ears pinned back with decorative clips.
examples.translation: Durante la fiesta de disfraces, tenía las orejas pegadas hacia atrás con broches decorativos.

examples.sentence: The rabbit’s ears were pinned back to prevent them from flopping during the race.
examples.translation: Las orejas del conejo estaban pegadas hacia atrás para evitar que se movieran durante la carrera.

examples.sentence: He had his ears pinned back by the tailor to accommodate the new hat style.
examples.translation: El sastre le pegó las orejas hacia atrás para adaptarse al nuevo estilo de sombrero.

examples.sentence: After missing the deadline, Susan had her ears pinned back by the manager in a stern meeting.
examples.translation: Después de perder la fecha límite, Susan fue regañada severamente por el gerente en una reunión.

examples.sentence: If you don’t complete your work on time, you’ll have your ears pinned back for sure.
examples.translation: Si no terminas tu trabajo a tiempo, seguro que te regañarán.

examples.sentence: When the students were caught cheating, they had their ears pinned back by the principal.
examples.translation: Cuando los estudiantes fueron pillados haciendo trampa, el director los reprendió duramente.

examples.sentence: Our team had its ears pinned back in the championship game, losing by a wide margin.
examples.translation: Nuestro equipo fue derrotado ampliamente en el juego del campeonato.

examples.sentence: They had their ears pinned back during the debate and couldn’t recover from the opponent’s arguments.
examples.translation: Fueron derrotados en el debate y no pudieron recuperarse de los argumentos del oponente.

examples.sentence: If we keep playing like this, we’re going to have our ears pinned back again in the finals.
examples.translation: Si seguimos jugando así, volveremos a ser derrotados en la final.

examples.sentence: He had his finger on the trigger, ready to fire if the intruder came closer.
examples.translation: Tenía el dedo en el gatillo, listo para disparar si el intruso se acercaba.

examples.sentence: During the training, they practiced having their fingers on the trigger with utmost caution.
examples.translation: Durante el entrenamiento, practicaron poner el dedo en el gatillo con sumo cuidado.

examples.sentence: She had her finger on the trigger but hesitated to pull it until she was sure of the target.
examples.translation: Tenía el dedo en el gatillo, pero dudó en apretarlo hasta estar segura del objetivo.

examples.sentence: By the time the officer arrived, the suspect already had his finger on the trigger of the weapon.
examples.translation: Cuando llegó el oficial, el sospechoso ya tenía el dedo en el gatillo del arma.

examples.sentence: The general has his finger on the trigger and is prepared to launch the offensive at any moment.
examples.translation: El general está listo para actuar y preparado para lanzar la ofensiva en cualquier momento.

examples.sentence: You could see he had his finger on the trigger during the negotiation, ready to make a decisive move.
examples.translation: Se notaba que estaba listo para actuar durante la negociación, preparado para tomar una decisión decisiva.

examples.sentence: If the market shifts suddenly, the investors have their fingers on the trigger to pull out their funds quickly.
examples.translation: Si el mercado cambia repentinamente, los inversores están listos para retirar sus fondos rápidamente.

examples.sentence: At the bake sale, she literally had her fingers in many pies, tasting each one before deciding.
examples.translation: En la venta de pasteles, literalmente tenía los dedos en muchos pasteles, probando cada uno antes de decidir.

examples.sentence: The children had their fingers in many pies, making a mess in every dessert tray on the table.
examples.translation: Los niños tenían los dedos en muchos pasteles, haciendo un desastre en cada bandeja de postres en la mesa.

examples.sentence: During the fair, I saw vendors with their fingers in many pies, offering samples to customers.
examples.translation: Durante la feria, vi a los vendedores con los dedos en muchos pasteles, ofreciendo muestras a los clientes.

examples.sentence: She had her fingers in many pies at the buffet, carefully selecting pieces from each one.
examples.translation: Tenía los dedos en muchos pasteles del buffet, seleccionando cuidadosamente pedazos de cada uno.

examples.sentence: James has his fingers in many pies, juggling projects from marketing to product design.
examples.translation: James está involucrado en muchos proyectos, desde marketing hasta diseño de productos.

examples.sentence: You can't expect to be an expert if you have your fingers in too many pies at once.
examples.translation: No puedes esperar ser un experto si estás involucrado en demasiadas cosas al mismo tiempo.

examples.sentence: She was warned about having her fingers in many pies because it might spread her too thin.
examples.translation: Le advirtieron que involucrarse en demasiadas cosas podría dispersarla demasiado.

examples.sentence: The cashier had her hand in the till as she counted the day's earnings.
examples.translation: La cajera tenía la mano en la caja mientras contaba las ganancias del día.

examples.sentence: He placed his hand in the till to grab some bills before giving change to the customer.
examples.translation: Puso la mano en la caja para sacar algunos billetes antes de darle el cambio al cliente.

examples.sentence: During the audit, the manager was seen with his hand in the till, verifying the cash amount.
examples.translation: Durante la auditoría, se vio al gerente con la mano en la caja, verificando la cantidad de dinero.

examples.sentence: She had her hand in the till, carefully organizing the coins and notes for the register.
examples.translation: Tenía la mano en la caja, organizando cuidadosamente las monedas y billetes para la caja registradora.

examples.sentence: The accountant was caught having his hand in the till, siphoning money from company funds.
examples.translation: El contador fue atrapado robando dinero de los fondos de la empresa.

examples.sentence: If anyone is suspected of having their hand in the till, an internal investigation will begin immediately.
examples.translation: Si se sospecha que alguien ha robado dinero, comenzará una investigación interna de inmediato.

examples.sentence: She denied having her hand in the till, but the evidence showed otherwise.
examples.translation: Ella negó haber robado dinero, pero las pruebas demostraron lo contrario.

examples.sentence: At the party, he had his hand out hoping someone would offer him a drink.
examples.translation: En la fiesta, tenía la mano extendida esperando que alguien le ofreciera una bebida.

examples.sentence: She held her hand out to receive the gift from the hostess graciously.
examples.translation: Extendió la mano para recibir el regalo de la anfitriona con gracia.

examples.sentence: Children had their hands out to catch the candy thrown during the parade.
examples.translation: Los niños tenían las manos extendidas para atrapar los dulces lanzados durante el desfile.

examples.sentence: During the ceremony, the awardee had her hand out to accept the prize with a smile.
examples.translation: Durante la ceremonia, la premiada extendió la mano para aceptar el premio con una sonrisa.

examples.sentence: He always has his hand out for a loan, even though he never pays back on time.
examples.translation: Siempre está pidiendo un préstamo, aunque nunca paga a tiempo.

examples.sentence: Don’t get used to having your hand out; learn to support yourself financially.
examples.translation: No te acostumbres a pedir ayuda; aprende a mantenerte financieramente.

examples.sentence: They have their hands out constantly, expecting favors from every department head.
examples.translation: Constantemente están pidiendo favores a cada jefe de departamento.

examples.sentence: She had her hands full carrying the groceries, the baby, and the dog on a leash.
examples.translation: Tenía las manos ocupadas llevando las compras, al bebé y al perro con la correa.

examples.sentence: During the move, I always had my hands full with boxes stacked high.
examples.translation: Durante la mudanza, siempre tenía las manos ocupadas con cajas apiladas.

examples.sentence: He couldn't answer the phone because he had his hands full fixing the broken chair.
examples.translation: No pudo contestar el teléfono porque tenía las manos ocupadas reparando la silla rota.

examples.sentence: They had their hands full balancing the trays of food at the banquet.
examples.translation: Tenían las manos ocupadas sosteniendo las bandejas de comida en el banquete.

examples.sentence: With three kids and a full-time job, Maria definitely has her hands full these days.
examples.translation: Con tres hijos y un trabajo a tiempo completo, María definitivamente está muy ocupada últimamente.

examples.sentence: You’ll have your hands full managing the event, so don’t hesitate to ask for help.
examples.translation: Tendrás mucho trabajo gestionando el evento, así que no dudes en pedir ayuda.

examples.sentence: The team has its hands full dealing with the unexpected software bugs before launch.
examples.translation: El equipo está muy ocupado solucionando los errores inesperados del software antes del lanzamiento.

examples.sentence: The phrenologist carefully had her head read to interpret the bumps and contours.
examples.translation: El frenólogo examinó cuidadosamente su cabeza para interpretar los bultos y contornos.

examples.sentence: He had his head read in the 19th century style, believing it would reveal his character traits.
examples.translation: Le examinaron la cabeza al estilo del siglo XIX, creyendo que revelaría sus rasgos de carácter.

examples.sentence: Having your head read by a phrenologist was considered a serious event back then.
examples.translation: Que te examinaran la cabeza por un frenólogo era considerado un evento serio en aquella época.

examples.sentence: They had their heads read in the museum exhibit demonstrating old pseudoscientific practices.
examples.translation: Les examinaron la cabeza en la exposición del museo que mostraba antiguas prácticas pseudocientíficas.

examples.sentence: After the accident, John had his head read to evaluate any psychological trauma.
examples.translation: Después del accidente, a John le hicieron un examen psicológico para evaluar cualquier trauma.

examples.sentence: She was nervous about having her head read but found the psychiatric evaluation helpful.
examples.translation: Estaba nerviosa por la evaluación psicológica, pero la encontró útil.

examples.sentence: If you feel overwhelmed, it might be a good idea to have your head read by a professional.
examples.translation: Si te sientes abrumado, podría ser buena idea que un profesional te evalúe mentalmente.

examples.sentence: You must have your head read if you think jumping off that roof is a good idea.
examples.translation: Debes estar loco si crees que saltar de ese techo es una buena idea.

examples.sentence: When Tom suggested quitting his job without a plan, I told him he needed to have his head read.
examples.translation: Cuando Tom sugirió renunciar a su trabajo sin un plan, le dije que estaba loco.

examples.sentence: If you believe that conspiracy theory, you really should have your head read.
examples.translation: Si crees en esa teoría conspirativa, realmente deberías estar loco.

examples.sentence: Even though the task was difficult, Maria had her heart in it and worked tirelessly.
examples.translation: Aunque la tarea era difícil, María estaba entregada y trabajó incansablemente.

examples.sentence: You can tell Jake has his heart in the project because he stays late every night.
examples.translation: Se nota que Jake está comprometido con el proyecto porque se queda hasta tarde todas las noches.

examples.sentence: She didn’t perform well, but at least she had her heart in the competition.
examples.translation: No tuvo un buen desempeño, pero al menos estaba entregada a la competencia.

examples.sentence: Though his advice was misguided, you could see he had his heart in the right place.
examples.translation: Aunque su consejo fue equivocado, se notaba que tenía buenas intenciones.

examples.sentence: She may be strict, but she definitely has her heart in the right place.
examples.translation: Puede ser estricta, pero definitivamente tiene buenas intenciones.

examples.sentence: I know he messed up, but I believe he had his heart in the right place all along.
examples.translation: Sé que cometió un error, pero creo que siempre tuvo buenas intenciones.

examples.sentence: After the medication, Sarah finally had her mind about her and could answer questions clearly.
examples.translation: Después de la medicación, Sarah recuperó la lucidez y pudo responder preguntas claramente.

examples.sentence: You need to have your mind about you before making such an important decision.
examples.translation: Debes estar en plena facultad mental antes de tomar una decisión tan importante.

examples.sentence: He didn’t have his mind about him during the crisis and acted irrationally.
examples.translation: No estaba en sus cabales durante la crisis y actuó de forma irracional.

examples.sentence: Though usually average, the singer had her moments of brilliance during the concert.
examples.translation: Aunque suele ser promedio, la cantante tuvo momentos de brillantez durante el concierto.

examples.sentence: Even the best athletes have their moments when everything just clicks.
examples.translation: Incluso los mejores atletas tienen sus momentos en que todo funciona perfectamente.

examples.sentence: He had his moments of genius while working on the project, impressing everyone.
examples.translation: Tuvo momentos de genialidad mientras trabajaba en el proyecto, impresionando a todos.

examples.sentence: I made sure to have my name on the application form before submitting it.
examples.translation: Me aseguré de tener mi nombre en el formulario de solicitud antes de enviarlo.

examples.sentence: All the participants had their names on the attendance sheet at the workshop.
examples.translation: Todos los participantes tenían sus nombres en la hoja de asistencia del taller.

examples.sentence: She noticed her name was on the list of winners posted on the bulletin board.
examples.translation: Notó que su nombre estaba en la lista de ganadores publicada en el tablón de anuncios.

examples.sentence: Before leaving the office, I had my name on the report to ensure credit for my work.
examples.translation: Antes de salir de la oficina, puse mi nombre en el informe para asegurar el crédito por mi trabajo.
